three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 structure is BULLISH (5 consecutive HH/HL closes). Prev candle (May 25) was hammer-like with long lower wick (221pts), rejected 29693 lows, closed at 80% of range at 29993. Current candle (May 26) gapped +25pts, trading above open at 30179, strong body (74%). Dealing Range: 28463-30199. Price at 98.9% of range = DEEP PREMIUM. No clear SMT divergence detected (only 1 swing high/low pair in last 20 bars). Premium at extreme = high reversal risk despite bullish structure.

No compression detected (normal range behavior). London KZ (02:00-05:00 NY) CLOSED. NY AM KZ (08:30-11:00 NY) PENDING - opens in ~2h. Pre-KZ analysis only; no M15 OB entry confirmed yet. Waiting for NY session open to confirm direction. Thin volume (Memorial Day holiday context).

reasoning: D1 structure shows 5-day bullish streak with consecutive higher closes and higher highs. However, price is at 98.9% of the D1 dealing range (28463-30199) — extreme PREMIUM territory where reversal risk is elevated. The CRT (H4 30007-30168) was purged to the upside, suggesting institutional buying pressure, but this occurs at a range extreme with no pullback to discount. SMT divergence analysis is inconclusive (only 1 swing pair detected in last 20 D1 bars). Memorial Day holiday context means volume is thin (today's volume 106K vs typical 250K+), making price action less reliable. ORB score of 40/100 reflects: strong D1 trend (+10/25), no VWAP data (0/15), no breakout volume yet (0/20), strong candle close but pre-KZ timing (10/15), limited ICT confluence (10/15), range too narrow for ORB (5/10). Profile assessment: Monday formed higher low, Tuesday pushing higher = Midweek Continuation pattern, but holiday week may distort the normal profile. Recommendation: Stand aside until NY AM Kill Zone (08:30 NY) opens. Watch for either (a) continuation above 30199 with NY volume confirming, or (b) reversal/pullback from premium toward 30000-29909 area. At 06:30 NY time, we are in a PRE-KILL ZONE holding pattern.
